optimizations_applied: Cached getGitInfo() per invocation — eliminates duplicate git spawns
Combined two rev-parse git calls into single invocation
Replaced autoTriggerCodebaseIntel with readCodebaseIntel in init fast paths
Eliminated redundant loadConfig call in cmdInitPlanPhase
Replaced direct fs.readFileSync with cachedReadFile for config.json in execute-phase
notes: Acorn (230KB) lazy-loaded as of Phase 65-01. Init commands optimized in Phase 65-02 to skip git staleness checks for codebase intel (read-only fast path). The 531 baseline read count was measured as total fs operations across all init commands; per-command counts are now tracked separately.
